subject: Excel shows circular reference warning and wrong totals
description: Spreadsheet used for budget; totals suddenly wrong; status bar mentions circular reference.

ts_steps.title: Formulas → Error checking
ts_steps.action: Circular References — jump to each cell; break loop by changing formula or using iterative calc intentionally.

ts_steps.title: Trace dependents
ts_steps.action: Use Trace Precedents/Dependents to find accidental self-reference in SUM range.

ts_steps.title: Named ranges
ts_steps.action: Formulas → Name Manager — remove duplicate or overlapping names pointing to full columns.

internal_information: User inserted row inside summed range that includes total row. Structured tables reduce this class of bug.
